1 in the 2nd (right) digit = Generic 

COMMENT: This field is only populated if the Medicare-defined Post Threshold Cost Shares do not apply. The 
catastrophic coverage phase is also referred to as the post-out-of-pocket threshold phase for the Part 
D benefit. 

The CCW team constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by sponsors to
